## Monolithic Power Systems Index Reclassification Raises Questions About Its AI Infrastructure Role

Index reclassifications affect passive ownership flows and peer-group benchmarking; if the shift reflects a revised sectoral classification of MPWR's AI role, it has implications for who owns the stock and how it is sized.

- MPWR underwent an index-constituent shift, framed as a signal of evolving positioning.
- Coverage raises the question of whether the move marks a 'new phase' in MPWR's AI infrastructure role.
- No specific index or financial metric is named in the headline; the framing is analytical rather than factual.
- Thesis-relevant given MPWR's placement in the ai_infrastructure_capex theme.
